# Implementation feedback

Use broad, anonymised summaries only. Do not include learner work, private reflections, images, videos, school records or AI logs. See `docs/ETHICS_AND_PUBLIC_TESTING.md`.

## Your role

- [ ] Parent or home educator
- [ ] Learner with adult support
- [ ] Teacher or educator
- [ ] Mentor or facilitator
- [ ] Alternative-provision practitioner
- [ ] Researcher or reviewer
- [ ] Project contributor
- [ ] Other

- [ ] Home education
- [ ] Mainstream school
- [ ] Alternative provision
- [ ] Informal learning or club
- [ ] Independent learner
- [ ] Adult review or simulation only
- [ ] Other

## What was unclear, unrealistic or unsuccessful?

## Suggested change

## Priority

- [ ] Low — minor improvement
- [ ] Medium — meaningful usability improvement
- [ ] High — significant barrier or risk
- [ ] Critical — safety, privacy or serious misuse concern

## Privacy confirmation

- [ ] I included no learner names or identifying details.
- [ ] I included no private reflections, sensitive personal details or school records.
- [ ] I included no images or videos of minors.
- [ ] I included no learner AI logs.
- [ ] I understand this issue is public and may be discussed publicly.
